questionHtml:
In 1911, twenty-five reindeer (Rangifer tarandus) were introduced onto Saint Paul Island in Alaska and the population was recorded for 40 years.

Suggest one possible cause for the decrease of the number of animals after 1940.
markschemeHtml: lack of food / disease / hunting / increase of predators

meta.title: Suggest one possible cause for the decrease of the number of animals after 1940.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Additional higher level topics)
